body: Hannah, I wanted to reach out before the new year to say how much I've valued your guidance this past year — your perspective on the data infrastructure space has been genuinely invaluable as we've shaped [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital)'s thesis around AI infrastructure at the seed and Series A stage. A few of our recent conversations around data pipeline efficiency and the convergence with climate tech have stuck with me, and I think they'll directly inform how we approach diligence in Q1. I'd love to find time in January to do a more structured debrief — there are two or three companies in the portfolio I'd specifically like your eyes on as they head into their next fundraising cycles. Would a call in the second or third week of January work for you? Wishing you a wonderful new year, and genuinely grateful for the relationship.
